# Copilot Instructions

## Canonical Policy Source

Use AGENTS.md at this repository root as the local bridge.

The canonical long-lived guardrails are maintained in:

- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/blob/main/AGENTS.md

## Required Startup Reads

Before substantial coding, review:

- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/blob/main/AGENTS.md
- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/blob/main/CONTEXT.md
- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/blob/main/DOCS-MAP.md
- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/blob/main/.agents/skills/README.md

## Skills And Guardrails

Do not duplicate documentation-repo skills or policy files in this repository.

Load skills directly from:

- https://github.com/thedrewdz/Greenhouse-Documentation/tree/main/.agents/skills
